heading: Support services
label: 10267 Support services
notes: Codificationand added identical sections.Pub. L. 100–202Pub. L. 100–203

References in Other Laws to GS–16, 17, or 18 Pay RatesReferences in laws to the rates of pay for GS–16, 17, or 18, or to maximum rates of pay under the General Schedule, to be considered references to rates payable under specified sections of Title 5, Government Organization and Employees, see section 529 [title I, § 101(c)(1)] of , set out in a note under .Pub. L. 101–509section 5376 of Title 5

children.heading: General services
children.label: a General services
children.text: To the extent permitted by law and requested by the Chairman, the Administrator of General Services shall provide the Board with necessary administrative services, facilities, and support on a reimbursable basis.

children.heading: Accounting, research, and technology assessment services
children.label: b Accounting, research, and technology assessment services
children.text: The Comptroller General, the Librarian of Congress, and the Director of the Office of Technology Assessment shall, to the extent permitted by law and subject to the availability of funds, provide the Board with such facilities, support, funds and services, including staff, as may be necessary for the effective performance of the functions of the Board.

children.heading: Additional support
children.label: c Additional support
children.text: Upon the request of the Chairman, the Board may secure directly from the head of any department or agency of the United States information necessary to enable it to carry out this subchapter.

children.heading: Mails
children.label: d Mails
children.text: The Board may use the United States mails in the same manner and under the same conditions as other departments and agencies of the United States.

children.heading: Experts and consultants
children.label: e Experts and consultants
children.text: Subject to such rules as may be prescribed by the Board, the Chairman may procure temporary and intermittent services under , but at rates for individuals not to exceed the daily equivalent of the maximum annual rate of basic pay payable for GS–18 of the General Schedule.section 3109(b) of title 5
